title: DNA Extraction from Bacteriophages
author: Frej Larsen
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bzkup4ww

steps.title: Pipet 1 µL 100x diluted Pierce Universal Nuclease (2
steps.instruction: Pipet 1 µL 100x diluted Pierce Universal Nuclease (2.5units/uL) to each well of a Qiagen S-block

steps.title: Transfer 140 µL of each sample...
steps.instruction: Transfer 140 µL of each sample from the outer chamber of the CentrisArt filter tube to the S-block. Mix by pipetting

steps.title: Add 540 µL AVL buffer to...
steps.instruction: Add 540 µL AVL buffer to inactivate nucleases and lyse phage heads. Mix by pipetting

steps.title: Add 560 µL absolute ethanol
steps.instruction: Add 560 µL absolute ethanol. Mix thoroughly by pipetting

steps.title: Transfer 630 µL to the QIAamp...
steps.instruction: Transfer 630 µL to the QIAamp 96 plate, then seal it with an AirPore tape sheet

steps.title: Place a QIAamp 96 plate on a new S-block
steps.instruction: Place a QIAamp 96 plate on a new S-block

steps.title: Load the QIAamp 96 plate on...
steps.instruction: Load the QIAamp 96 plate on the S-block into a rotor bucket. Centrifuge 5500 x g, 21 °C, 4 minutes or until all liquid has passed through the filter

steps.title: Repeat steps 8 and 9 until...
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 8 and 9 until all of the sample has passed through the filter

steps.title: Replace the bottom S-block and add...
steps.instruction: Replace the bottom S-block and add 500 µL AW1 wash buffer to each well, then seal the QIAamp 96 plate

steps.title: Load the QIAamp 96 plate on...
steps.instruction: Load the QIAamp 96 plate on the S-block into a rotor bucket. Centrifuge 5500 x g, 21 °C, 5 minutes or until all liquid has passed through the filter

steps.title: Remove the seal, add 500 µL...
steps.instruction: Remove the seal, add 500 µL AW2 wash buffer to each well, then reseal the plate.

steps.title: Load the QIAamp 96 plate on...
steps.instruction: Load the QIAamp 96 plate on the S-block into a rotor bucket. Centrifuge 5500 x g, 21 °C, 5 minutes or until all liquid has passed through the filter

steps.title: Place the QIAamp 96 plate on...
steps.instruction: Place the QIAamp 96 plate on a new S-block and centrifuge 5500 x g, 21 °C, 10 minutes to dry the membrane

steps.title: Discard the S-block and place the...
steps.instruction: Discard the S-block and place the QIAamp 96 plate on an A&A receiving plate. Add 60 µL AVE elution buffer directly onto the filter membrane

steps.title: Seal the plate with an AirPore...
steps.instruction: Seal the plate with an AirPore Tape sheet, then incubate at room temperature for 00:10:00

steps.title: Load the QIAamp 96 plate on...
steps.instruction: Load the QIAamp 96 plate on the receiving plate into a rotor bucket. Centrifuge 5500 x g, 21 °C, 4 minutes

steps.title: Discard the QIAamp 96 plate, seal...
steps.instruction: Discard the QIAamp 96 plate, seal the receiving plate for storage and store at -80 °C
